find-all-claude-code-transcripts.title: Find All Claude Code Transcripts
find-all-claude-code-transcripts.description: List all Claude Code session transcripts on this machine and spawn a local browser UI for picking one to analyze. Privacy-preserving: server-side redaction, localhost only, no uploads.

get-one-claude-code-transcript.title: Get One Claude Code Transcript
get-one-claude-code-transcript.description: Given a session id, materialize the main transcript plus any subagent transcripts into a single tmp folder, ready for analysis.

analyze-agent-transcript.title: Analyze Agent Transcript
analyze-agent-transcript.description: Orchestrator. Break a session into goal-aligned segments, run the per-segment analyses, and produce a single consolidated report of actionable recommendations across human prompting, Skills, and MCP servers.

analyze-user-prompt.title: Analyze User Prompt
analyze-user-prompt.description: Per-prompt analyzer. Classify the prompt (question vs delegation), identify the goal, judge whether it was closed-loop, and feed the human-prompting recommendation bucket.

pull-together-goal-context.title: Pull Together Goal Context
pull-together-goal-context.description: Reach into git repos and external systems when a prompt's goal is not self-evident from the prompt alone. Ground the analyzer's understanding before drawing conclusions.

analyze-skill-trigger-performance.title: Analyze Skill Trigger Performance
analyze-skill-trigger-performance.description: Per-segment analyzer for false positives (Skills that fired but shouldn't have) and false negatives (Skills that should have fired but didn't). Recommends modify-description changes.

analyze-skill-action-performance.title: Analyze Skill Action Performance
analyze-skill-action-performance.description: Per-segment analyzer for Skills that did run. Assesses helpfulness, token cost, and whether the Skill closed the loop. Recommends body refinements or deletions.

analyze-skill-gaps.title: Analyze Skill Gaps
analyze-skill-gaps.description: Per-segment analyzer for missing Skills. Identifies moments where a well-placed Skill would have prevented a wrong turn or saved turns, and proposes new Skills with a description and body sketch.

analyze-mcp-trigger-performance.title: Analyze MCP Trigger Performance
analyze-mcp-trigger-performance.description: Per-segment analyzer for MCP tools that fired when they shouldn't have, and tools that should have fired but didn't (e.g. agent reached for a CLI instead). Recommends description or surface changes.

analyze-mcp-action-performance.title: Analyze MCP Action Performance
analyze-mcp-action-performance.description: Per-segment analyzer for MCP tool calls that happened. Assesses response shape, token cost, and whether the tool closed the loop. Recommends tool or server modifications.

analyze-mcp-gaps.title: Analyze MCP Gaps
analyze-mcp-gaps.description: Per-segment analyzer for missing MCP servers / tools. Identifies foreseeable closed-loop limitations the agent could not work around, and proposes new servers or tools.
